name: cc-nexs
description: 五方异构 SOP 的 Codex Plugin：完整复刻 cc-nexs full / fast / hotfix 流水线、文档落点、角色边界与状态机编排。

interface.shortDescription: Run cc-nexs SOP workflows in Codex
interface.longDescription: cc-nexs brings the same full, fast, and hotfix SOP workflows used in Claude Code into Codex. It mirrors command behavior, document write locations, role isolation, state-machine progression, and build/test selection.
